features.description: The app launches and serves the UI.
features.acceptance: GET / returns HTTP 200 and HTML containing both panels.

features.description: Left panel lists documents read from the data directory.
features.acceptance: GET /api/documents returns a JSON array of {id,title} read from data/documents/.

features.description: Right panel answers questions grounded in a document, with a citation.
features.acceptance: POST /api/ask {q} returns {answer, source} where source is the matching document title.
features.evidence: POST /api/ask {q:'harness'} -> {answer:'A harness wraps a model with tools, verification, and rules.', source:'Harness'}

features.description: Documents live in the local data directory and survive a restart.
features.acceptance: A document written to data/documents/ is still listed by /api/documents after the server restarts.
features.evidence: Wrote data/documents/ci.json, restarted server, GET /api/documents still lists CI (+harness,+welcome).
